title: 2Pcs Large Christmas Snowy Pine Needle Branches with Berries Pine Cones, 68CM Frosted Christmas Tree Branches Cones Berries Picks Christmas Artificial Pine Stems Picks for Xmas Tree Vase Fillers Decor
features: Magnificent Pine Branches: 60cm tall snowy pine needles with berries & cones, add grandeur to your Xmas tree or home decor.
Frosted Elegance: The Christmas frosted picks create a wintery wonderland feel, enhancing the festive ambiance of any space.
Realistic Artificial Stems: Crafted to resemble nature's beauty, these snowy pine berry branches bring the charm of Christmas indoors.
Versatile Decorative Pieces: Perfect for filling vases, wreaths, or as standalone decorations, adding texture & depth to your displays.
Durable & Long-Lasting: Made to withstand seasonal use, these Christmas pine cone berry stems maintain their snowy freshness, effortlessly creating a cozy and festive atmosphere.
